setupFailure.reason: Electron app is running (processes observed) and port 9222 shows LISTENING, but CDP connections timeout. This suggests the Electron app may not have been started with --remote-debugging-port flag, or the CDP endpoint is blocked.
setupFailure.errorObserved: All CDP connection attempts timeout or fail - Electron processes running but CDP endpoint not accessible
setupFailure.codeInspectionFinding: Batal button fix appears correctly implemented in code - all form pages call resetForm() followed by onCancel()
